name: seed corpus: P-2 eval-dataset bootstrap reads seed/agent-datasets/<agent>.jsonl as the initial dataset for each review subagent
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/p2-bootstrap-from-seed.sh" --agent review-types && [ -s evals/datasets/agents/review-types.jsonl ] && grep -E '"bootstrap_seed":true' evals/datasets/agents/review-types.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
